description.p: Capture a region, window, or the whole screen, annotate it - arrows, text, highlights, and pixelation for redacting secrets - and upload it to ImgBB, Imgur, catbox.moe, 0x0.st, or your own server, with the link landing on your clipboard.

ul.li: Annotation editor after every capture, with blur and mosaic redaction
Automatic secret detection: OCR finds API keys, emails, and tokens and pixelates them in one click
Screen recording to MP4, webm, or GIF
OCR a region straight to the clipboard
Color picker and pin-to-screen reference windows
Searchable capture history with thumbnails and delete links
System tray, global shortcuts on KDE, and a full CLI

screenshot.caption: Main window with capture actions and history

description.p: Annotation editor with redaction, multiple upload destinations, screen recording, OCR, color picker, pin-to-screen, and a portal-based capture backend for any Wayland compositor.
